heading: Omitted
label: 752 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which provided that nothing in this subchapter would abrogate any water rights of a tribe or its members, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Sept. 1, 1954, ch. 1207, § 1268 Stat. 1103
